message:
test(conformance): add time_ops fixture direct execution test

Adds time_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case test covering
time, clock, clock_gettime, localtime_r with pattern-based outputs
(POSITIVE_INT, NON_NEGATIVE, TM_STRUCT).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
